Game.Name: Super Fire Pro Wrestling III - Easy Type (Japan)
Game.plot: Super Fire ProWrestling 3 EasyType is an Action game, developed by Human Club and published by Human Entertainment,which was released in Japan in 1994.Cheat: Hidden Boss battlesUsing the built in password system, input any ONE of these passwords to fight one of the hidden Bosses in the Singles or Tag Team Tournament. Once one of the codes is inputted correctly, press "EXIT" to activate.
